mapper.sql: id, user_id, balance, total_earned, total_spent, created_at, updated_at
mapper.update: UPDATE user_points_account SET balance = #{balance}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE user_points_account SET balance = balance + #{points}, total_earned = total_earned + #{points}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE user_points_account SET balance = balance - #{points}, total_spent = total_spent + #{points}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
